title: Automatic Release of Reserved Units for Scheduled Transfusions
description: The system shall automatically release reserved units if not used within the configured timeframe after a scheduled transfusion.
rationale: To ensure that blood products are available for patients as scheduled and to prevent waste in cases where transfusions are not completed on time.
business_value: Reduces wastage of blood products, improves resource utilization, and ensures timely availability for patients requiring transfusions.

source.description: As a blood bank manager I need units to be reserved for scheduled transfusions and automatically released if not used within a timeframe So that blood products are available for scheduled patients without being wasted if unused

acceptance_criteria: Given a scheduled transfusion with reserved units
When the scheduled time passes without the units being used
Then the reservation is automatically released
preconditions: The system supports scheduling transfusions in advance
A defined timeframe for unit release is configured
Units are reserved only for confirmed scheduled transfusions
postconditions: The reservation is automatically released if not used within the configured timeframe
edge_cases: What happens if a scheduled transfusion is canceled before the timeframe expires?
How should the system handle units reserved for multiple patients that are not all used within the timeframe?
What if there is a system outage during the reservation period, and it prevents the automatic release of unused units?

interfaces.name: Scheduling API
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the Scheduling API to confirm scheduled transfusions and manage reservations.

interfaces.name: Blood Inventory Database
interfaces.description: The requirement updates the Blood Inventory Database to reserve units and track their usage status.

test_cases.description: Confirm that a reservation is automatically released if not used within the configured timeframe.
test_cases.expected_result: The reservation should be automatically released, and the units should be available for future use.

test_cases.description: Verify that unused units are not released prematurely if a scheduled transfusion is canceled before the timeframe expires.
test_cases.expected_result: The reservation should remain intact until the cancellation is confirmed and the units are no longer needed.

test_cases.description: Check that the system handles multiple reservations for different patients correctly.
test_cases.expected_result: Each patient's reservation should be managed independently, and unused units should only be released when their respective timeframe has expired.
